notes: Modal footer cutoff fix, take 2 (the v53 fix was incomplete for tall forms like the new Major-purchase scenario with the EMI preview). Root cause: the overlay used align-items:center AND overflow-y:auto together — when the modal is taller than the viewport, centering pushed the footer below the fold even though the overlay could scroll. Fix: removed align-items:center from the overlay; the modal now centers via margin:auto (short modals stay centered, tall ones sit at top and the footer stays pinned). Modal max-height changed from 90dvh to calc(100dvh - 32px) so the modal plus the overlay's 16px padding always fits inside the viewport — the footer can never be pushed under. Mobile bottom-sheet behavior preserved (margin:0 reset so translateY still works).
